nasb.text: and its pillars shall be twenty, with their twenty sockets of bronze; the hooks of the pillars and their bands shall be of silver.

esv.text: Its twenty pillars and their twenty bases shall be of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.

cnv.text: 帷幔的柱子要二十根，銅插座二十個。柱子上的鉤子和桁子都是銀的。

ccb.text: 帷幔有二十根柱子，二十个带凹槽的铜底座，柱子上的钩子和横杆都是银的。
